skills.name: Frost Bolt
skills.description: Launches a bolt of frost, dealing 20 magical damage and reducing enemy agility by 6 for 2 rounds.

passive.name: Arcane Mind
passive.description: Naturally channels mana, regenerating 6 mana every round in combat.

statusEffects.description: Regenerate 10% HP and Mana per turn in combat

skills.name: Backstab
skills.description: Strikes from the shadows. Deals 14 physical damage.

passive.name: Shadow Step
passive.description: Agility directly translates to dodge chance in combat. High agility = hard to hit.

statusEffects.description: Regenerate 10% HP and Mana per turn in combat

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description: Bashes the enemy with a shield, dealing 12 physical damage and stunning them for 1 round.

passive.name: Iron Will
passive.description: When HP drops below 25%, defense increases by 8.

statusEffects.description: Regenerasi 10% HP dan Mana tiap giliran dalam combat
